title: The Crypt of the Fallen
description: Investigate the ancient crypt beneath the ruined chapel. Strange noises have been heard, and the dead may not rest easy.

stages.title: Enter the Crypt
stages.description: Descend into the crypt and explore the upper level.
objectives: Enter the Crypt of the Fallen

success.narrative: You've made it past the upper crypt. The stairs lead deeper into darkness.

failure.narrative: You retreat from the crypt, but the mystery remains unsolved.

stages.title: Descend Deeper
stages.description: Navigate the lower crypts and find the source of the disturbance.
objectives: Find evidence of what disturbs the dead

success.narrative: The dark shrine reveals the source — something powerful lurks below.

failure.narrative: The undead overwhelm you. Perhaps you need to prepare better.

stages.title: Confront the Guardian
stages.description: Defeat the ogre guardian in the crypt's deepest chamber.

success.narrative: The ogre falls and the portal flares to life. The crypt's dark influence is broken — for now.

failure.narrative: The ogre proves too powerful. You barely escape with your life.

failure_consequences.narrative: The disturbances continue. Marta grows more worried.
